title: EternisStarrySky
description: This mod adds a series of adventure-themed items.
body:
This mod introduces a series of items with textures inspired by the Avaritia shader. It includes armor, weapons, and utility items, centered around a data-driven 9x9 ultimate workbench that allows players to freely add custom crafting recipes and supports JEI integration.

A hidden item is also included, though it currently does not appear in the creative menu due to being unfinished. It can be obtained using the command:
/give @p eternisstarrysky:infinity_sword_true.

Patchouli is required as a dependency.
